case_title: JAMES THAMES VS. G C SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY THAMES, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT G C SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAMES, JAMES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-15-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE TO ADVERSE PARTY OF REMOVAL TO FEDERAL DISTRICT COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT G C SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-12-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARNCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-16-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT SERVICE BY PUBLICATION IS NOT ALLOWED IN SMALL CLAIMS CASES. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
